detectors.description:
Reentrancy in PussInBoots.openTrading() (PussInBoots.sol#451-469):
	External calls:
	- uniswapV2Pair = IUniswapV2Factory(uniswapV2Router.factory()).createPair(address(this),uniswapV2Router.WETH()) (PussInBoots.sol#457)
	- uniswapV2Router.addLiquidityETH{value: address(this).balance}(address(this),balanceOf(address(this)),0,0,owner(),block.timestamp) (PussInBoots.sol#459)
	External calls sending eth:
	- uniswapV2Router.addLiquidityETH{value: address(this).balance}(address(this),balanceOf(address(this)),0,0,owner(),block.timestamp) (PussInBoots.sol#459)
	State variables written after the call(s):
	- tradingOpen = true (PussInBoots.sol#465)
	PussInBoots.tradingOpen (PussInBoots.sol#233) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- PussInBoots.openTrading() (PussInBoots.sol#451-469)

	- [uniswapV2Router.addLiquidityETH{value: address(this).balance}(address(this),balanceOf(address(this)),0,0,owner(),block.timestamp)](PussInBoots.sol#L459)
	External calls sending eth:
	- [uniswapV2Router.addLiquidityETH{value: address(this).balance}(address(this),balanceOf(address(this)),0,0,owner(),block.timestamp)](PussInBoots.sol#L459)
	State variables written after the call(s):

	[PussInBoots.tradingOpen](PussInBoots.sol#L233) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- [PussInBoots.openTrading()](PussInBoots.sol#L451-L469)

detectors.description:
Reentrancy in PussInBoots._transfer(address,address,uint256) (PussInBoots.sol#385-423):
	External calls:
	- swapTokensForEth(contractTokenBalance) (PussInBoots.sol#407)
		- uniswapV2Router.swapExactTokensForETHSupportingFeeOnTransferTokens(tokenAmount,0,path,address(this),block.timestamp) (PussInBoots.sol#437)
	External calls sending eth:
	- sendETHToFee(address(this).balance) (PussInBoots.sol#413)
		- _taxWallet.transfer(amount) (PussInBoots.sol#445)
	State variables written after the call(s):
	- _tokenTransfer(from,to,amount) (PussInBoots.sol#421)
		- _rOwned[address(this)] = _rOwned[address(this)].add(rTeam) (PussInBoots.sol#505)
		- _rOwned[sender] = _rOwned[sender].sub(rAmount) (PussInBoots.sol#485)
		- _rOwned[recipient] = _rOwned[recipient].add(rTransferAmount) (PussInBoots.sol#487)
	PussInBoots._rOwned (PussInBoots.sol#197) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- PussInBoots._takeTeam(uint256) (PussInBoots.sol#499-507)
	- PussInBoots._transferStandard(address,address,uint256) (PussInBoots.sol#481-495)
	- PussInBoots.balanceOf(address) (PussInBoots.sol#299-303)
	- PussInBoots.constructor() (PussInBoots.sol#253-263)
	- _tokenTransfer(from,to,amount) (PussInBoots.sol#421)
		- _rTotal = _rTotal.sub(rFee) (PussInBoots.sol#513)
	PussInBoots._rTotal (PussInBoots.sol#209) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- PussInBoots._getCurrentSupply() (PussInBoots.sol#609-619)
	- PussInBoots._reflectFee(uint256,uint256) (PussInBoots.sol#511-517)
	- PussInBoots.constructor() (PussInBoots.sol#253-263)
	- PussInBoots.tokenFromReflection(uint256) (PussInBoots.sol#349-357)
